found.quote: Processing means live hosting of raw individual records in the production database and does not include diagnostic review, metric creation, cache retention, format conversion, or support troubleshooting.
Vendor may appoint outside hosting, support, and operations providers after giving Customer a courtesy update. Vendor remains responsible for service availability.
Vendor will send an initial written alert within 10 business days after its internal response team completes confirmation and executive review.
Retained copies required by law or archival controls remain subject to this DPA until deleted.
After annual assurance materials are delivered, no further control review is available for the same contract year unless Vendor agrees in writing.
Vendor will provide internal onboarding materials to personnel assigned to the service.
After annual assurance materials are delivered, no further control review is available for the same contract year unless Vendor agrees in writing.
